headline: VLY Stock Rallies 3.9% as Q1 Earnings Beat on Higher NII & Fee Income
summary: Valley National jumps 3.9% after Q1 earnings beat on higher NII and fee income, with revenue growth and lower provisions offsetting rising expenses.
